prompt: I'm running Aider on my home desktop and I'm heading out. I use Tailscale so I can reach my machine remotely. What's the command to get my Aider session accessible on my phone even when I'm not home?

assertions.text: Response uses `aider` as the agent argument, not `claude` or a generic placeholder
Response includes the `--tailscale` flag in the command
Response provides the complete assembled command: `npx itwillsync aider --tailscale`
Response explains WHY --tailscale is used (works outside home network / uses VPN IP, not just local WiFi)
